'''Joth Katrane''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Human/Legends|Human]] from [[Corellia/Legends|Corellia]] who was present at [[Desolation Alley]] on [[Oovo IV/Legends|Oovo IV]] during the waning [[Standard year/Legends|years]] of the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]]. In [[32 BBY/Legends|32 BBY]], he was wanted by someone who cheated him out of his pension by reporting his 'extra' income to the warden. Eventually, his [[Bounty/Legends|bounty]] was claimed by the [[Mandalorian/Legends|Mandalorian]]-turned [[Bounty hunter/Legends|Bounty hunter]] named [[Jango Fett/Legends|Jango Fett]].

==Behind the scenes==
Joth Katrane's bounty is 6,000 [[Galactic Credit Standard/Legends|credits]] alive and 3,000 credits dead.

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: Bounty Hunter]]'' {{1st}}
